positive: A highly detailed, symmetrical celestial botanical illustration featuring stylized night-blooming flowers, crescent moons, and scattered star clusters. The composition should be centralized and arranged in a harmonious, elegant wreath or mandalic pattern. Style should merge Art Nouveau elegance with clean, modern vector art aesthetics. Use rich, deep midnight blue and teal tones contrasted sharply with bright, metallic gold lines and filigree accents. The artwork must read like a high-quality, stylized print ready for apparel. Focus on clean silhouettes, intricate linework, and perfect symmetry. Minimalistic background color bleeding, ensuring the artwork stands out strongly.
negative: photo, photorealistic, blurry, dirty, messy, artifacts, grain, watermark, text, signature, low resolution, noise, extra limbs, bad anatomy, monochrome, cartoon, graffiti, logo, trademark
